ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adds a 4th threshold button, for damage ≥ double the severe threshold
ast.target: 添加第四个阈值按钮，用于伤害 ≥ 严重阈值的两倍

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used for battle points calculation in the status bar
ast.target: 用于状态栏中的战斗点数计算

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adversaries from notes, JSON and YAML files in this folder will become available in search
ast.target: 来自此文件夹中笔记、JSON 和 YAML 文件的对手将在搜索中可用

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If multiple adversaries share the same name, only the first one found will be used in search
ast.target: 如果多个对手同名，搜索中将只使用找到的第一个

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Any FSB-compatible statblocks in the notes inside the library folder will be also be available in search
ast.target: 库文件夹内笔记中任何兼容 FSB 的属性块也将在搜索中可用

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 与 Fantasy Statblocks 的兼容性

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Library folder does not exist in the vault
ast.target: 库文件夹在保险库中不存在

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A horse-sized insect with digging claws and acidic blood.
ast.target: 一种马匹大小的昆虫，拥有挖掘爪和酸性血液。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Burrower takes Severe damage, all creatures within Close range are bathed in their acidic blood, taking 1d10 physical damage. This splash covers the ground within Very Close range with blood, and all creatures other than the Burrower who move through it take 1d6 physical damage.
ast.target: 当掘地虫受到严重伤害时，近距离范围内的所有生物都会被其酸性血液溅射，受到1d10点物理伤害。这次溅射会在极近距离范围内的地面上留下血液，除掘地虫外，任何穿过该区域的生物都会受到1d6点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large bear with thick fur and powerful claws.
ast.target: 一只皮毛厚实、爪子有力的大熊。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who mark HP from the Bear's standard attack are knocked back to Very Close range.
ast.target: 被熊的标准攻击标记生命值的目标会被击退至极近距离范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, deal 3d4+10 physical damage and the target is Restrained until they break free with a successful Strength Roll.
ast.target: 标记1点压力，对近战范围内的目标发动攻击。成功时，造成3d4+10点物理伤害，目标被束缚，直到通过一次成功的力量检定挣脱。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Bear makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当熊对一名玩家角色成功发动攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive humanoid who sees all sapient life as food.
ast.target: 一个将所有有知觉生命视为食物的巨大人形生物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: You must spend a Fear to spotlight the Ogre. While spotlighted, they can make their standard attack against all targets within range.
ast.target: 你必须花费1点恐惧来让食人魔成为焦点。当其成为焦点时，他们可以对范围内的所有目标发动标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Ogre's attacks deal direct damage.
ast.target: 食人魔的攻击造成直接伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Ogre marks 2 or more HP, they can rampage. Move the Ogre to a point within Close range and deal 2d6+3 direct physical damage to all targets in their path.
ast.target: 当食人魔标记2点或更多生命值时，他们可以横冲直撞。将食人魔移动到近距离范围内的一个点，并对其路径上的所有目标造成2d6+3点直接物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Construct marks HP from physical damage, they must mark an additional HP.
ast.target: 当构装体因物理伤害标记生命值时，他们必须额外标记1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make an attack against all targets in the Construct's path when they move. Targets the Construct succeeds against take 1d8 physical damage.
ast.target: 标记1点压力，当构装体移动时，对其路径上的所有目标发动攻击。构装体成功命中的目标受到1d8点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Before rolling damage for the Construct's attack, you can mark a Stress to gain a +10 bonus to the damage roll. The Construct can then take the spotlight again.
ast.target: 在为构装体的攻击掷伤害骰之前，你可以标记1点压力，为伤害骰获得+10加值。然后构装体可以再次成为焦点。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An ambitious and ostentatiously dressed socialite.
ast.target: 一位雄心勃勃、衣着华丽的社交名流。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to say something mocking and force a target within Close range to make a Presence Reaction Roll (14) to see if they can save face. On a failure, the target must mark 2 Stress and is Vulnerable until the scene ends.
ast.target: 标记1点压力，说些嘲讽的话，并迫使近距离范围内的目标进行一次存在感反应检定（14），以看他们能否挽回颜面。失败时，目标必须标记2点压力，并在场景结束前处于易伤状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear and target a PC. The Courtier convinces a crowd or prominent individual that the target is the cause of their current conflict or misfortune.
ast.target: 花费1点恐惧并指定一名玩家角色。朝臣说服一群人或一位显要人物，认为该目标是他们当前冲突或不幸的根源。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A burly vegetable-person with grasping vines.
ast.target: 一个身材魁梧、长着抓握藤蔓的蔬菜人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Slam the ground, knocking all targets within Very Close range back to Far range. Each target knocked back this way must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 猛击地面，将极近距离范围内的所有目标击退至远距离范围。每个被这样击退的目标必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large wolf with menacing teeth, seldom encountered alone.
ast.target: 一只长着骇人獠牙的大狼，很少单独出现。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Wolf makes a successful standard attack and another Dire Wolf is within Melee range of the target, deal 1d6+5 physical damage instead of their standard damage and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 如果狼成功发动标准攻击，并且另一只恐狼在目标的近战范围内，则造成1d6+5点物理伤害，而不是其标准伤害，并且你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Dozens of fist-sized mosquitoes, flying together for protection.
ast.target: 数十只拳头大小的蚊子，为了保护而一起飞行。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Mosquitoes have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+1 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当蚊群已标记其生命值的一半或更多时，它们的标准攻击改为造成1d4+1点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Mosquitoes have a +2 bonus to their Difficulty.
ast.target: 飞行时，蚊群的难度获得+2加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Mosquitoes' attack causes a target to mark HP, you can mark a Stress to force the target to mark an additional HP.
ast.target: 当蚊群的攻击导致目标标记生命值时，你可以标记1点压力，迫使目标额外标记1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cat-sized rodent skilled at scavenging and survival.
ast.target: 一只猫大小的啮齿动物，擅长拾荒和生存。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Rat is defeated when they take any damage. For every 3 damage a PC deals to the Rat, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 老鼠受到任何伤害即被击败。玩家角色每对老鼠造成3点伤害，就额外击败攻击范围内一个会被命中的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A human-sized arachnid with tearing claws and a stinging tail.
ast.target: 一只人类大小的蛛形纲动物，长着撕裂爪和带刺的尾巴。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make a standard attack against two targets within Melee range.
ast.target: 标记1点压力，对近战范围内的两个目标发动标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Scorpion makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当蝎子对一名玩家角色成功发动攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A clear serpent with a massive head that leaves behind a glass shard trail wherever they go.
ast.target: 一条透明的蛇，长着巨大的头颅，无论走到哪里都会留下玻璃碎片的痕迹。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: After a successful attack against the Snake within Melee range, the attacker must mark an Armor Slot. If they can't mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an HP.
ast.target: 在近战范围内对蛇成功发动攻击后，攻击者必须标记一个护甲槽。如果他们无法标记护甲槽，则必须标记1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Snake succeeds against take 1d6+1 physical damage.
ast.target: 标记1点压力，对极近距离范围内的所有目标发动攻击。蛇成功命中的目标受到1d6+1点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A nimble fighter armed with javelins.
ast.target: 一名手持标枪的敏捷战士。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: After making a standard attack, the Harrier can move anywhere within Far range.
ast.target: 发动标准攻击后，掠袭者可以移动到远距离范围内的任何地方。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature moves into Melee range to make an attack, you can mark a Stress before the attack roll to move anywhere within Close range and make an attack against that creature. On a success, deal 1d10+2 physical damage.
ast.target: 当一个生物进入近战范围发动攻击时，你可以在攻击骰前标记1点压力，移动到近距离范围内的任何地方，并对该生物发动攻击。成功时，造成1d10+2点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Far range. On a success, mark a Stress to deal 1d12+3 physical damage. If the target marks HP from this attack, they have disadvantage on Agility Rolls until they clear at least 1 HP.
ast.target: 对远距离范围内的一个目标发动攻击。成功时，标记1点压力以造成1d12+3点物理伤害。如果目标因此攻击标记生命值，他们在清除至少1点生命值前，敏捷检定处于劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A creature who tries to move within Very Close range of the Guard must succeed on an Agility Roll. If additional Bladed Guards are standing in a line alongside the first, and each is within Melee range of another guard in the line, the Difficulty increases by the total number of guards in that line.
ast.target: 试图进入守卫极近距离范围内的生物必须通过一次敏捷检定。如果额外的刃卫与第一个守卫站成一排，且每个守卫都在该排中另一个守卫的近战范围内，则难度按该排中守卫的总数增加。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, mark a Stress to Restrain the target until they break free with a successful attack, Finesse Roll, or Strength Roll.
ast.target: 对极近距离范围内的一个目标发动攻击。成功时，标记1点压力以束缚目标，直到他们通过一次成功的攻击、技巧检定或力量检定挣脱。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A seasoned guard with a mace, a whistle, and a bellowing voice.
ast.target: 一名经验丰富的守卫，手持钉头锤、哨子，声音洪亮。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to spotlight the Head Guard and up to 2d4 allies within Far range.
ast.target: 消耗2点恐惧值，将焦点放在守卫队长及其最多2d4名远距范围内的盟友身上。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Head Guard makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当守卫队长成功攻击一名玩家角色时，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cunning criminal in a cloak bearing one of the gang's iconic knives.
ast.target: 一个狡猾的罪犯，身披斗篷，手持帮派标志性的匕首。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Bandit climbs just as easily as they run.
ast.target: 强盗攀爬起来和奔跑一样轻松。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Bandit succeeds on a standard attack from above a target, they deal 1d10+1 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 当强盗从目标上方成功发动标准攻击时，他们造成1d10+1点物理伤害，而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A staff-wielding bandit in a cloak adorned with magical paraphernalia, using curses to vex their foes.
ast.target: 一个手持法杖、斗篷上饰有魔法器物的强盗，用诅咒折磨敌人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against up to three targets within Very Close range. Mark a Stress to deal 2d6+3 magic damage to targets the Hexer succeeded against.
ast.target: 对极近距范围内的最多三个目标发动攻击。标记1点压力值，对诅咒师成功命中的目标造成2d6+3点魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An imposing brawler carrying a large club.
ast.target: 一个手持大棒的威猛斗士。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Creatures Restrained by the Kneebreaker take double damage from attacks by other adversaries.
ast.target: 被断膝者束缚的生物受到其他敌对生物攻击时，所受伤害翻倍。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, the target takes no damage but is Restrained and Vulnerable. The target can break free, clearing both conditions, with a successful Strength Roll or is freed automatically if the Kneebreaker takes Major or greater damage.
ast.target: 对近距范围内的一个目标发动攻击。成功时，目标不受到伤害，但被束缚且处于易伤状态。目标可以通过一次成功的力量检定挣脱，清除两种状态；或者如果断膝者受到重大或更严重的伤害，目标会自动获释。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Lackey is defeated when they take any damage. For every 3 damage a PC deals to the Lackey, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 当跟班受到任何伤害时即被击败。玩家角色每对跟班造成3点伤害，就额外击败攻击范围内一个攻击会命中的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A seasoned bandit in quality leathers with a strong voice and cunning eyes.
ast.target: 一个身着优质皮甲、声音洪亮、眼神狡黠的资深强盗。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight the Lieutenant, mark a Stress to also spotlight two allies within Close range.
ast.target: 当你将焦点放在副官身上时，标记1点压力值，同时将焦点放在近距范围内的两名盟友身上。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Summon three Jagged Knife Lackeys, who appear at Far range.
ast.target: 召唤三名锯齿匕首跟班，他们出现在远距范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to make an attack against a Vulnerable target within Close range. On a success, deal 2d6+12 physical damage and the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧值，对近距范围内的一个易伤目标发动攻击。成功时，造成2d6+12点物理伤害，且目标必须标记1点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Lieutenant makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当副官成功攻击一名玩家角色时，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A nimble scoundrel bearing a wicked knife and utilizing shadow magic to isolate targets.
ast.target: 一个身手敏捷的恶棍，手持一把邪恶匕首，并利用暗影魔法孤立目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Shadow succeeds on a standard attack that has advantage, they deal 1d6+6 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 当暗影在具有优势的标准攻击中成功时，他们造成1d6+6点物理伤害，而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Become Hidden until after the Shadow's next attack. Attacks made while Hidden from this feature have advantage.
ast.target: 进入隐藏状态，直到暗影的下一次攻击之后。利用此特性在隐藏状态下发动的攻击具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A lanky bandit striking from cover with a shortbow.
ast.target: 一个从掩体后用短弓攻击的瘦长强盗。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Sniper is Hidden when they make a successful standard attack against a target, they deal 1d10+4 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 如果狙击手在对目标发动成功的标准攻击时处于隐藏状态，他们造成1d10+4点物理伤害，而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A finely dressed trader with a keen eye for financial gain.
ast.target: 一个衣着考究、对财务收益眼光敏锐的商人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A PC who succeeds on a Presence Roll against the Merchant gains a discount on purchases. A PC who fails on a Presence Roll against the Merchant must pay more and has disadvantage on future Presence Rolls against the Merchant.
ast.target: 成功通过针对商人的魅力检定的玩家角色，在购买时获得折扣。未能通过针对商人魅力检定的玩家角色，必须支付更多，并且未来针对该商人的魅力检定具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC rolls a 14 or lower on a Presence Roll made against the Merchant, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当玩家角色在针对商人的魅力检定中掷出14或更低时，他们必须标记1点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A coruscating mass of uncontrollable magic.
ast.target: 一团闪烁不定、无法控制的魔法团块。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a HP to force all targets within Close range to mark a Stress and become Vulnerable until their next rest or they clear a HP.
ast.target: 标记1点生命值，迫使近距范围内的所有目标标记1点压力值，并处于易伤状态，直到他们下次休息或清除1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to transform the area within Very Close range into a different biome. All targets within this area take 2d6+3 direct magic damage.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧值，将极近距范围内的区域转变为不同的生态环境。该区域内的所有目标受到2d6+3点直接魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A living flame the size of a large bonfire.
ast.target: 一团大型篝火大小的活体火焰。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to choose a point within Far range. The ground within Very Close range of that point immediately bursts into flames. All creatures within this area must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d8 magic damage from the flames. Targets who succeed take half damage.
ast.target: 标记1点压力值，选择远距范围内的一个点。该点极近距范围内的地面立即燃起火焰。该区域内的所有生物必须进行一次敏捷反应检定。失败的目标受到2d8点火焰魔法伤害。成功的目标受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A crimson-hued creature from the Circles Below, consumed by rage against all mortals.
ast.target: 一个来自深渊圈层的深红色生物，对所有凡人充满愤怒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to rain down hellfire within Far range. All targets within the area must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 1d20+3 magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧值，在远距范围内降下地狱之火。该区域内的所有目标必须进行一次敏捷反应检定。失败的目标受到1d20+3点魔法伤害。成功的目标受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An ambulatory sapling rising up to defend their forest.
ast.target: 一棵为保卫森林而起身的行走树苗。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Treant is defeated when they take any damage. For every 5 damage a PC deals to the Treant, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 当树人受到任何伤害时即被击败。玩家角色每对树人造成5点伤害，就额外击败攻击范围内一个攻击会命中的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A moving mound of translucent green slime.
ast.target: 一团移动的半透明绿色粘液堆。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight the Ooze and they don't have a token on their stat block, they can't act yet. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they're preparing to do. When you spotlight the Ooze and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can act.
ast.target: 当你将焦点放在软泥怪身上，且其状态栏上没有标记时，它还不能行动。在其状态栏上放置一个标记，并描述它正在准备做什么。当你将焦点放在软泥怪身上，且其状态栏上有标记时，清除该标记，它便可以行动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Ooze makes a successful attack, the target must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits (they can still use armor to reduce the damage). If they can't mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP.
ast.target: 当软泥怪成功发动攻击时，目标必须标记一个护甲槽，但不获得其收益（他们仍然可以使用护甲来减少伤害）。如果他们无法标记护甲槽，则必须额外标记1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A small moving mound of translucent green slime.
ast.target: 一团小型移动的半透明绿色粘液堆。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A moving mound of translucent flaming red slime.
ast.target: 一团移动的半透明燃烧红色粘液堆。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target takes 1d8 magic damage and is Ignited until they're extinguished with a successful Finesse Roll (14). While Ignited, the target takes 1d4 magic damage when they make an action roll.
ast.target: 对极近距范围内的一个目标发动攻击。成功时，目标受到1d8点魔法伤害，并被点燃，直到他们通过一次成功的灵巧检定（14）扑灭。在被点燃期间，目标在进行动作检定时受到1d4点魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A small moving mound of translucent flaming red slime
ast.target: 一团小型移动的半透明燃烧红色粘液堆。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature within Melee range deals damage to the Ooze, they take 1d6 direct magic damage.
ast.target: 当近距范围内的一个生物对软泥怪造成伤害时，该生物受到1d6点直接魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A richly dressed and adorned aristocrat brimming with hubris.
ast.target: 一个衣着华丽、傲慢自大的贵族。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: All social actions made against the Noble on their land have disadvantage.
ast.target: 在其领地上针对该贵族的所有社交行动具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, mark a Stress to summon 1d4 Bladed Guards, who appear at Far range to enforce the Noble's will.
ast.target: 每场景一次，标记1点压力值，召唤1d4名刀锋卫士，他们出现在远距范围，以执行贵族的意志。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear and target a PC. The Noble proclaims that the target and their allies are exiled from the noble's territory. While exiled, the target and their allies have disadvantage during social situations within the Noble's domain.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧值并指定一名玩家角色。贵族宣布该目标及其盟友被驱逐出贵族的领地。在被驱逐期间，目标及其盟友在贵族领地内的社交场合中具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A charismatic sea dog with an impressive hat, eager to raid and plunder.
ast.target: 一个戴着令人印象深刻帽子、渴望劫掠的迷人老水手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Captain marks 2 or fewer HP from an attack within Melee range, the attacker must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当船长在近距范围内受到攻击，标记2点或更少生命值时，攻击者必须标记1点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, mark a Stress to summon a Pirate Raiders Horde, which appears at Far range.
ast.target: 每场景一次，标记1点压力值，召唤一个海盗掠夺者集群，它出现在远距范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Captain makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当船长成功攻击一名玩家角色时，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Seafaring scoundrels moving in a ravaging pack.
ast.target: 成群结队、四处劫掠的海上恶棍。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Raiders have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+1 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当掠夺者已标记其生命值的一半或更多时，其标准攻击改为造成1d4+1点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Raiders mark 2 or fewer HP from an attack within Melee range, the attacker must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当掠夺者在近战范围内因一次攻击标记2点或更少生命值时，攻击者必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A thickly muscled and tattooed pirate with melon-sized fists.
ast.target: 一个肌肉发达、纹身遍布的海盗，拳头大如甜瓜。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Tough marks 2 or fewer HP from an attack within Melee range, the attacker must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当硬汉在近战范围内因一次攻击标记2点或更少生命值时，攻击者必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, mark a Stress to move into Melee range of the target, dealing 3d4 physical damage and knocking the target back to Close range.
ast.target: 对极近范围内的目标发动一次攻击。成功时，标记1点压力以移动至目标的近战范围内，造成3d4点物理伤害并将目标击退至近距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An armed mercenary testing their luck.
ast.target: 一个碰运气的武装雇佣兵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Sellsword is defeated when they take any damage. For every 4 damage a PC deals to the Sellsword, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 佣兵在受到任何伤害时被击败。玩家角色每对佣兵造成4点伤害，即可额外击败攻击范围内一个攻击会成功的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A fragile skeleton with a shortbow and arrows.
ast.target: 一个手持短弓和箭矢的脆弱骷髅。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When two or more adversaries are within Very Close range of a creature, all damage the Archer deals to that creature is doubled.
ast.target: 当两个或更多敌人在极近范围内时，弓箭手对该生物造成的所有伤害翻倍。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a Vulnerable target within Far range. On a success, mark a Stress to deal 3d4+8 physical damage.
ast.target: 对远距离内的一个易受攻击的目标发动一次攻击。成功时，标记1点压力以造成3d4+8点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Dredge is defeated when they take any damage. For every 4 damage a PC deals to the Dredge, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 掘墓者在受到任何伤害时被击败。玩家角色每对掘墓者造成4点伤害，即可额外击败攻击范围内一个攻击会成功的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large armored skeleton with a huge blade.
ast.target: 一个手持巨刃的大型装甲骷髅。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Knight makes a successful attack, all PCs within Close range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当骑士成功发动攻击时，近距离内的所有玩家角色失去1点希望，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Knight succeeds against take 1d8+2 physical damage and must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 标记1点压力，对极近范围内的所有目标发动一次攻击。骑士成功命中的目标受到1d8+2点物理伤害，并必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A dirt-covered skeleton armed with a rusted blade.
ast.target: 一个手持生锈刀刃、满身泥土的骷髅。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Warrior is resistant to physical damage.
ast.target: 战士对物理伤害有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A mercenary combining swordplay and magic to deadly effect.
ast.target: 一个将剑术与魔法结合以产生致命效果的雇佣兵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Damage dealt by the Spellblade's standard attack is considered both physical and magic.
ast.target: 魔剑士标准攻击造成的伤害同时被视为物理和魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress and target a group within Far range. All targets must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 1d8+2 magic damage. You gain a Fear for each target who marked HP from this attack.
ast.target: 标记1点压力，以远距离内的一群目标为目标。所有目标必须通过一次敏捷反应检定，否则受到1d8+2点魔法伤害。你为每个因此次攻击标记生命值的目标获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to spotlight up to five allies within Far range.
ast.target: 花费2点恐惧，以聚光灯照耀远距离内最多五名盟友。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Spellblade makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当魔剑士成功攻击一名玩家角色时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A skittering mass of ordinary rodents moving as one like a ravenous wave.
ast.target: 一群像饥渴浪潮般移动的普通啮齿动物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Swarm has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+1 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当虫群已标记其生命值的一半或更多时，其标准攻击改为造成1d4+1点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: All targets within Melee range have disadvantage on attacks against targets other than the Swarm.
ast.target: 近战范围内的所有目标对虫群以外的目标发动攻击时处于劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A faerie warrior adorned in armor made of leaves and bark.
ast.target: 一位身着树叶与树皮制成盔甲的精灵战士。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Soldier makes a standard attack and another Sylvan Soldier is within Melee range of the target, deal 1d8+5 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 如果士兵发动标准攻击，且另一名精灵士兵在目标的近战范围内，则改为造成1d8+5点物理伤害，而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to pull down a tree within Close range. A creature hit by the tree must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (15) or take 1d10 physical damage.
ast.target: 花费1点恐惧，拉倒近距离内的一棵树。被树击中的生物必须通过一次敏捷反应检定（15），否则受到1d10点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cluster of animate, blood-drinking tumbleweeds, each the size of a large gourd.
ast.target: 一团会动的、吸血的风滚草，每棵都有大葫芦那么大。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Swarm has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+2 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当虫群已标记其生命值的一半或更多时，其标准攻击改为造成1d4+2点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to deal 2d6+8 direct physical damage to a target with 3 or more bramble tokens.
ast.target: 标记1点压力，对拥有3个或更多荆棘标记的目标造成2d6+8点直接物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 一棵会动的、吸血的风滚草。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Bramble is defeated when they take any damage. For every 4 damage a PC deals to the Tangle Bramble, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 荆棘丛在受到任何伤害时被击败。玩家角色每对缠结荆棘丛造成4点伤害，即可额外击败攻击范围内一个攻击会成功的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When an attack from the Bramble causes a target to mark HP and there are three or more Tangle Bramble Minions within Close range, you can combine the Minions into a Tangle Bramble Swarm Horde. The Horde's HP is equal to the number of Minions combined.
ast.target: 当荆棘丛的攻击导致目标标记生命值，且近距离内有三个或更多缠结荆棘丛爪牙时，你可以将这些爪牙合并为一个缠结荆棘丛虫群集群。集群的生命值等于合并的爪牙数量。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A master-at-arms wielding a sword twice their size.
ast.target: 一位手持比自己还大两倍的剑的武器大师。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make a standard attack against a target. On a success, mark a Stress to Taunt the target until their next successful attack. The next time the Taunted target attacks, they have disadvantage against targets other than the Weaponmaster.
ast.target: 对一个目标发动一次标准攻击。成功时，标记1点压力以嘲讽该目标，直到其下一次成功攻击。被嘲讽的目标下次攻击时，对武器大师以外的目标处于劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, spend a Fear to clear 2 HP and 2 Stress.
ast.target: 每场景一次，花费1点恐惧以清除2点生命值和2点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Weaponmaster makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当武器大师成功攻击一名玩家角色时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An imperious tree-person leading their forest's defenses.
ast.target: 一位威严的树人，领导着森林的防御。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to spotlight 1d4 allies within range of a target they can attack without moving. On a success, their attacks deal half damage.
ast.target: 标记1点压力，以聚光灯照耀目标范围内1d4名盟友，他们无需移动即可攻击该目标。成功时，他们的攻击造成一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Dryad makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当树精成功攻击一名玩家角色时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large corpse, decay-bloated and angry.
ast.target: 一具肿胀腐烂、充满愤怒的大型尸体。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight the Zombie and they don't have a token on their stat block, they can't act yet. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they're preparing to do. When you spotlight the Zombie and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can act.
ast.target: 当你聚光灯照耀僵尸且其状态栏上没有标记时，他们还不能行动。在其状态栏上放置一个标记，并描述他们正在准备做什么。当你聚光灯照耀僵尸且其状态栏上有标记时，清除该标记，他们可以行动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make a standard attack with advantage against a target the Zombie has Restrained. On a success, the attack deals direct damage.
ast.target: 对僵尸已束缚的目标发动一次具有优势的标准攻击。成功时，该攻击造成直接伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A towering gestalt of corpses moving as one, with torso-sized limbs and fists as large as a grown halfling.
ast.target: 一个由尸体组成的巨大集合体，像躯干一样粗壮的四肢，拳头大如成年半身人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombie takes Major or greater damage, they mark an additional HP.
ast.target: 当僵尸受到重大或更严重的伤害时，他们额外标记1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombie makes a standard attack, they can attack all targets within Very Close range.
ast.target: 当僵尸发动标准攻击时，他们可以攻击极近范围内的所有目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to cause all PCs within Far range to make a Presence Reaction Roll (13). Targets who fail lose a Hope and you gain a Fear for each. Targets who succeed must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 标记1点压力，使远距离内的所有玩家角色进行一次存在感反应检定（13）。失败的目标失去1点希望，你为每个失败者获得1点恐惧。成功的目标必须标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A decaying corpse ambling toward their prey.
ast.target: 一具腐烂的尸体，蹒跚地走向猎物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Zombie is defeated when they take any damage. For every 3 damage a PC deals to the Zombie, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 僵尸在受到任何伤害时被击败。玩家角色每对僵尸造成3点伤害，即可额外击败攻击范围内一个攻击会成功的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An animated corpse that moves shakily, driven only by hunger.
ast.target: 一具行动蹒跚、仅受饥饿驱使的活尸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombie is within Melee range of a creature and at least one other Zombie is within Close range, all attacks against that creature have advantage.
ast.target: 当僵尸处于一个生物的近战范围内，且至少有另一只僵尸处于近距离范围内时，对该生物的所有攻击都具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who mark HP from the Zombie's attacks must also mark a Stress.
ast.target: 被僵尸攻击命中的目标还必须标记一点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A group of shambling corpses instinctively moving together.
ast.target: 一群本能地聚集在一起的蹒跚行尸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombies have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+2 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当僵尸的生命值被标记过半或更多时，它们的标准攻击改为造成1d4+2点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombies mark HP from an attack within Melee range, you can mark a Stress to make a standard attack against the attacker.
ast.target: 当僵尸在近战范围内被攻击命中时，你可以标记一点压力，对攻击者进行一次标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A group of trained archers bearing massive bows.
ast.target: 一群手持巨弓的训练有素的弓箭手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Squadron has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d6+3 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当中队的生命值被标记过半或更多时，它们的标准攻击改为造成1d6+3点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to target a point within Far range. Make an attack with advantage against all targets within Close range of that point. Targets the Squadron succeeds against take 1d10+4 physical damage.
ast.target: 消耗一点恐惧，以远距离内的一个点为目标。对该点近距离范围内的所有目标进行一次具有优势的攻击。中队成功命中的目标受到1d10+4点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to target a point within Far range. Until the next roll with Fear, a creature who moves within Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. On a failure, they take 2d6+3 physical damage. On a success, they take half damage.
ast.target: 标记一点压力，以远距离内的一个点为目标。直到下一次带有恐惧的掷骰为止，移动到该点近距离范围内的生物必须进行一次敏捷反应掷骰。失败时，它们受到2d6+3点物理伤害。成功时，它们受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Assassin is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Assassin, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 刺客受到任何伤害时即被击败。玩家角色每对刺客造成6点伤害，就在攻击能成功命中的范围内额外击败一个爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cunning scoundrel skilled in both poisons and ambushing.
ast.target: 一个精通毒药和伏击的狡诈恶棍。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who mark HP from the Assassin's attacks are Vulnerable until they clear a HP.
ast.target: 被刺客攻击命中的目标在清除一点生命值之前处于易伤状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Assassin has advantage on attacks if they are Hidden.
ast.target: 刺客处于隐藏状态时，其攻击具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Drop a smoke bomb that fills the air within Close range with smoke, Dizzying all targets in this area. Dizzied targets have disadvantage on their next action roll, then clear the condition.
ast.target: 投掷一枚烟雾弹，使近距离范围内的空气充满烟雾，令该区域内所有目标眩晕。眩晕的目标在其下一次行动掷骰时具有劣势，然后清除该状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A seasoned killer with a threatening voice and a deadly blade.
ast.target: 一个声音威胁、手持致命利刃的老练杀手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Assassin deals direct damage while they're Hidden.
ast.target: 刺客处于隐藏状态时造成直接伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to spotlight a number of other Assassins equal to the Assassin's unmarked Stress.
ast.target: 标记一点压力，以聚光灯照亮数量等于刺客未标记压力值的其他刺客。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Assassin successfully makes a standard attack against a Vulnerable target, you can spend a Fear to deal Severe damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 当刺客成功对一个易伤目标进行标准攻击时，你可以消耗一点恐惧，改为造成严重伤害而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Assassin makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当刺客成功攻击一名玩家角色时，你获得一点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cube-shaped construct with a different rune on each of their six sides.
ast.target: 一个立方体构造物，六个面各刻有不同的符文。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Before rolling damage for the Box's attack, you can mark a Stress to add a d6 to the damage roll. Additionally, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 在为盒子的攻击掷伤害骰之前，你可以标记一点压力，在伤害骰上增加一个d6。此外，你获得一点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A floating humanoid skull animated by scintillating magic.
ast.target: 一个由闪烁魔法驱动的漂浮人形骷髅。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Skull levitates several feet off the ground and can't be Restrained.
ast.target: 骷髅悬浮在离地数英尺的空中，且无法被束缚。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Skull is resistant to magic damage.
ast.target: 骷髅对魔法伤害有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Skull succeeds against take 2d6+4 magic damage.
ast.target: 标记一点压力，对近距离范围内的所有目标进行一次攻击。骷髅成功命中的目标受到2d6+4点魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to make an attack against a PC with a Spellcast trait within Very Close range. On a success, the target marks 1d4 Stress and the Skull clears that many Stress. Additionally, on a success, the Skull can immediately be spotlighted again.
ast.target: 消耗一点恐惧，对极近距离内拥有施法特质的玩家角色进行一次攻击。成功时，目标标记1d4点压力，骷髅清除等量的压力。此外，成功时，骷髅可以立即再次被聚光灯照亮。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A poorly trained civilian pressed into war.
ast.target: 一个被强征入伍、训练不足的平民。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Conscript is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Conscript, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 征召兵受到任何伤害时即被击败。玩家角色每对征召兵造成6点伤害，就在攻击能成功命中的范围内额外击败一个爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An accomplished manipulator and master of the social arts.
ast.target: 一位造诣深厚的操纵者和社交艺术大师。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An experienced mage wielding shadow and fear.
ast.target: 一位驾驭阴影与恐惧的资深法师。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to make a standard attack against a target within range. On a success, the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 消耗一点恐惧，对射程内的一个目标进行一次标准攻击。成功时，目标必须标记一点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to wrap an ally within Close range in a shroud of Protection until the Adept marks their last HP. While Protected, the target has resistance to all damage.
ast.target: 标记一点压力，为近距离内的一名盟友披上一层保护罩，直到术士标记其最后一点生命值。处于保护状态时，目标对所有伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear and choose a point within Far range. All targets within Close range of that point are Restrained in smoky chains until they break free with a successful Strength or Instinct Roll. A target Restrained by this feature must spend a Hope to make an action roll.
ast.target: 消耗一点恐惧，选择远距离内的一个点。该点近距离范围内的所有目标被烟雾锁链束缚，直到它们通过一次成功的力量或本能掷骰挣脱。被此特性束缚的目标必须消耗一点希望才能进行行动掷骰。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Twice per scene, when a PC rolls a failure with Fear, clear a Stress.
ast.target: 每场场景两次，当玩家角色掷出带有恐惧的失败时，清除一点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 一名转行成为邪教徒的职业杀手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Fang can climb and walk on vertical surfaces. Mark a Stress to move from one shadow to another within Far range.
ast.target: 獠牙可以在垂直表面攀爬和行走。标记一点压力，从一个阴影移动到远距离内的另一个阴影。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A low-ranking cultist in simple robes, eager to gain power.
ast.target: 一个身穿简朴长袍、渴望获得力量的低阶邪教徒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Initiate is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Initiate, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 新信徒受到任何伤害时即被击败。玩家角色每对新信徒造成6点伤害，就在攻击能成功命中的范围内额外击败一个爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Unnatural hounds lit from within by hellfire.
ast.target: 体内燃烧着地狱之火的非自然猎犬。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Pack has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d4+1 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当兽群的生命值被标记过半或更多时，它们的标准攻击改为造成2d4+1点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make all targets within Very Close range lose a Hope. If a target is not able to lose a Hope, they must instead mark 2 Stress.
ast.target: 标记一点压力，使极近距离内的所有目标失去一点希望。如果目标无法失去希望，则必须改为标记两点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Pack makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当兽群成功攻击一名玩家角色时，你获得一点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A swarm of eels that encircle and electrocute.
ast.target: 一群环绕并电击目标的鳗鱼群。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Eels have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d4+1 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当鳗鱼群的生命值被标记过半或更多时，它们的标准攻击改为造成2d4+1点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. You gain a Fear for each target that marks HP.
ast.target: 标记一点压力，对极近距离内的所有目标进行一次标准攻击。每有一个目标被标记生命值，你获得一点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An armored squire or experienced commoner looking to advance.
ast.target: 一名身着盔甲的侍从或寻求晋升的有经验平民。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to move into Melee range of an ally and make a standard attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, deal 2d10+2 physical damage and the ally can clear a Stress.
ast.target: 标记一点压力，移动到一名盟友的近战范围内，并对极近距离内的一个目标进行一次标准攻击。成功时，造成2d10+2点物理伤害，且该盟友可以清除一点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Experiment is resistant to physical damage.
ast.target: 实验体对物理伤害有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a target the Experiment attacks has other adversaries within Very Close range, the Experiment deals double damage.
ast.target: 当实验体攻击的目标在极近距离内有其他敌手时，实验体造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to spotlight the Experiment as an additional GM move instead of spending Fear.
ast.target: 标记一个压力点，将实验作为额外的GM行动来聚焦，而不是消耗恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A leather-clad warrior bearing a whip and massive bow.
ast.target: 一位身着皮甲、手持鞭子和巨弓的战士。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Beastmaster is spotlighted, you can also spotlight a Tier 1 animal adversary currently under their control.
ast.target: 当兽王被聚焦时，你也可以聚焦一个当前受其控制的1级动物对手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Twice per scene, summon a Bear, Dire Wolf, or similar Tier 1 animal adversary under the Beastmaster's control. The adversary appears at Close range and is immediately spotlighted.
ast.target: 每场景两次，召唤一头熊、恐狼或类似的1级动物对手，受兽王控制。对手出现在近距离并立即被聚焦。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An especially muscular giant wielding a warhammer larger than a human.
ast.target: 一位异常强壮的巨人，挥舞着比人还大的战锤。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Brawler marks 2 or more HP from an attack within Very Close range, you can make a standard attack against the attacker. On a success, the Brawler deals 2d6+15 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 当拳手在极近距离内因攻击标记2点或更多生命值时，你可以对攻击者进行一次标准攻击。成功时，拳手造成2d6+15点物理伤害，而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Brawler makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当拳手对一名玩家角色成功进行攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A giant fighter wearing borrowed armor.
ast.target: 一位身穿借来盔甲的巨人战士。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Recruit is defeated when they take any damage. For every 7 damage a PC deals to the Recruit, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 新兵受到任何伤害即被击败。每当一名玩家角色对新兵造成7点伤害，就额外击败攻击范围内一个攻击会成功的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A giant bird of prey with blood-stained talons.
ast.target: 一只爪子沾满鲜血的巨型猛禽。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Eagle gains a +3 bonus to their Difficulty.
ast.target: 飞行时，鹰获得+3难度加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Eagle can drop a Restrained target they are holding. When dropped, the target is no longer Restrained but starts falling. If their fall isn't prevented during the PCs' next action, the target takes 2d20 physical damage when they land.
ast.target: 飞行时，鹰可以丢下它抓着的被束缚目标。被丢下时，目标不再被束缚，但开始下落。如果在玩家角色的下一个行动中未能阻止其下落，目标落地时将受到2d20点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A snake-headed, scaled humanoid with a gilded bow, enraged that their peace has been disturbed.
ast.target: 一个蛇头、覆鳞的人形生物，手持镀金弓，因安宁被打扰而愤怒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Gorgon makes a successful standard attack, the target Glows until the end of the scene and can't become Hidden. Attack rolls made against a Glowing target have advantage.
ast.target: 当蛇发女妖成功进行标准攻击时，目标发光直至场景结束，且无法隐藏。对发光目标进行的攻击掷骰具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack roll against a target within Melee range using the Gorgon's protective snakes. On a success, mark a Stress to deal 2d10+4 physical damage and the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 使用蛇发女妖的保护蛇对近战范围内的目标进行攻击掷骰。成功时，标记一个压力点，造成2d10+4点物理伤害，且目标必须标记一个压力点。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Gorgon makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当蛇发女妖对一名玩家角色成功进行攻击时，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A horse-sized insect with iridescent scales and crystalline wings moving faster than the eye can see.
ast.target: 一匹马大小的昆虫，拥有虹彩鳞片和水晶翅膀，移动速度肉眼难辨。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Before the Flickerfly makes an attack, roll a d6. On a result of 4 or higher, the target's Evasion is halved against this attack.
ast.target: 在闪烁飞虫进行攻击前，掷一个d6。结果为4或更高时，目标的闪避值在此攻击中减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to create a magically dazzling display that grapples the minds of nearby foes. All targets within Close range must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. For each target who failed, you gain a Fear and the Flickerfly learns one of the target's fears.
ast.target: 标记一个压力点，创造一个魔法炫目展示，攫取附近敌人心智。所有近距离内的目标必须进行一次本能反应掷骰。每个失败的目标，你获得1点恐惧，且闪烁飞虫得知目标的一个恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A decorated soldier with heavy armor and a powerful steed.
ast.target: 一位身着重甲、骑乘强大战马的精锐士兵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the Knight is on a mount, they gain a +2 bonus to their Difficulty. When they take Severe damage, they're knocked from their mount and lose this benefit until they're next spotlighted.
ast.target: 当骑士骑乘时，获得+2难度加值。当他们受到严重伤害时，会被击落坐骑，并失去此加值，直到下次被聚焦。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Knight takes physical damage, reduce it by
ast.target: 当骑士受到物理伤害时，将其减少

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Knight is mounted, move up to Far range and make a standard attack against a target. On a success, deal 2d8+4 physical damage and the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 如果骑士骑乘，移动至远距离并对一个目标进行标准攻击。成功时，造成2d8+4点物理伤害，且目标必须标记一个压力点。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to spotlight 1d4+1 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.
ast.target: 标记一个压力点，聚焦1d4+1个盟友。以此方式聚焦时，他们进行的攻击造成一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cunning thief with acrobatic skill and a flair for the dramatic.
ast.target: 一位狡猾的盗贼，身手矫健，富有戏剧天赋。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An accomplished merchant with a large operation under their command.
ast.target: 一位成就斐然的商人，掌控着庞大的产业。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to offer a target a dangerous bargain for something they want or need. If used on a PC, they must make a Presence Reaction Roll (17). On a failure, they must mark 2 Stress or take the deal.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧，向一个目标提供一项危险交易，以换取他们想要或需要的东西。若用于玩家角色，他们必须进行一次存在感反应掷骰（17）。失败时，他们必须标记2点压力点或接受交易。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, mark a Stress to summon 1d4+1 Tier 1 adversaries, who appear at Far range, to enforce the Baron's will.
ast.target: 每场景一次，标记一个压力点，召唤1d4+1个1级对手，他们出现在远距离，以执行男爵的意志。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: You must spend a Fear to spotlight the Minotaur. While spotlighted, they can make their standard attack against all targets within range.
ast.target: 你必须消耗1点恐惧来聚焦牛头怪。聚焦时，他们可以对范围内所有目标进行标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Hunter makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当猎人成功进行攻击时，远距离内的所有玩家角色失去1点希望，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to curse a target within Very Close range with a necrotic Deathlock until the end of the scene. Attacks made by the Hunter against a Deathlocked target deal direct damage. The Hunter can only maintain one Deathlock at a time.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧，诅咒极近距离内的一个目标，使其带有死灵锁直至场景结束。猎人对带有死灵锁的目标进行的攻击造成直接伤害。猎人一次只能维持一个死灵锁。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to spotlight 1d4 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.
ast.target: 标记一个压力点，聚焦1d4个盟友。以此方式聚焦时，他们进行的攻击造成一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Countdown (Loop 1d6). When the Hunter is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, move the Hunter in a straight line to a point within Far range and make an attack against all targets in their path. Targets the Hunter succeeds against take 2d8+2 physical damage.
ast.target: 倒计时（循环1d6）。当猎人首次被聚焦时，激活倒计时。触发时，猎人沿直线移动至远距离内的一点，并对路径上的所有目标进行攻击。猎人成功命中的目标受到2d8+2点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A high-ranking courtier with the ear of the local nobility.
ast.target: 一位高级宫廷侍臣，深受当地贵族信任。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A PC who rolls less than 17 on an action roll targeting the Advisor must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 一名玩家角色对顾问进行行动掷骰结果低于17时，必须标记一个压力点。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to influence an NPC within Melee range with whispered words. That target's opinion on one matter shifts toward the Advisor's preference unless it is in direct opposition to the target's motives.
ast.target: 标记一个压力点，通过耳语影响近战范围内的一个NPC。该目标对某一事项的看法将向顾问的偏好转变，除非这与目标的动机直接冲突。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A clandestine leader with a direct channel to the Fallen Gods.
ast.target: 一位秘密领袖，与堕落神祇有直接联系。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to spotlight 1d4 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.
ast.target: 消耗2点恐惧，聚焦1d4个盟友。以此方式聚焦时，他们进行的攻击造成一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight an ally within Far range, mark a Stress to gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当你聚焦远距离内的一个盟友时，标记一个压力点以获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large aquatic predator, always on the move.
ast.target: 一种大型水生掠食者，总是在移动中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Shark makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当鲨鱼成功进行攻击时，远距离内的所有玩家角色失去1点希望，你获得1点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Shark makes a successful attack, the target must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits (they can still use armor to reduce the damage). If they can't mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP.
ast.target: 当鲨鱼成功进行攻击时，目标必须标记一个护甲槽，但不获得其收益（他们仍可使用护甲减少伤害）。如果无法标记护甲槽，他们必须额外标记1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A half-fish person with shimmering scales and an irresistible voice.
ast.target: 一个半人半鱼的生物，鳞片闪烁，声音令人无法抗拒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Siren makes a standard attack against a target Entranced by their song, the attack deals 2d10+1 damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 如果塞壬对一个被其歌声迷住的目标进行标准攻击，该攻击造成2d10+1点伤害，而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A ghostly fighter with an ethereal bow, unable to move on while their charge is vulnerable.
ast.target: 一位幽灵般的战士，手持幽灵弓，在其守护对象脆弱时无法安息。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Archer has resistance to physical damage. Mark a Stress to move up to Close range through solid objects.
ast.target: 弓箭手对物理伤害有抗性。标记一个压力点，可穿过固体物体移动至近距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to make an attack within Far range against a PC who is within Very Close range of at least two other PCs. On a success, the target takes 2d8+12 physical damage.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧，对一名玩家角色进行远距离攻击，该目标需处于至少另外两名玩家角色的极近距离内。成功时，目标受到2d8+12点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A ghostly commander leading their troops beyond death.
ast.target: 一位幽灵般的指挥官，在死后继续率领部队。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Captain has resistance to physical damage. Mark a Stress to move up to Close range through solid objects.
ast.target: 队长对物理伤害有抗性。标记一个压力点，可穿过固体物体移动至近距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to return up to 1d4+1 defeated Spectral allies to the battle at the points where they first appeared (with no marked HP or Stress).
ast.target: 消耗2点恐惧，将最多1d4+1个被击败的幽灵盟友送回战场，出现在他们最初出现的位置（无标记的生命值或压力点）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Captain's Spectral allies are forced to make a reaction roll, you can mark a Stress to give those allies a +2 bonus to the roll.
ast.target: 当船长的幽灵盟友被迫进行反应检定时，你可以标记一个压力点，为这些盟友的检定提供+2加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A ghostly fighter with spears and swords, anchored by duty.
ast.target: 一个手持长矛和剑的幽灵战士，被职责所束缚。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Guardian has resistance to physical damage. Mark a Stress to move up to Close range through solid objects.
ast.target: 守护者对物理伤害具有抗性。标记一个压力点，以穿过固体物体移动至近距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, deal 2d10+6 physical damage and the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 消耗一个恐惧点，对极近距离内的目标发动攻击。成功时，造成2d10+6点物理伤害，且目标必须标记一个压力点。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A skilled espionage agent with a knack for being in the right place to overhear secrets.
ast.target: 一位技艺精湛的间谍特工，擅长在恰当的地点窃听秘密。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to describe how the Spy knows a secret about a PC in the scene.
ast.target: 消耗一个恐惧点，描述间谍如何知道场景中某个玩家角色的秘密。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A prowling hunter, like a slinking mountain lion, with a slate-gray stone body.
ast.target: 一个潜行的猎手，如同潜行的山狮，拥有石板灰色的石头身躯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Stonewraith can move through stone and earth as easily as air. While within stone or earth, they are Hidden and immune to all damage.
ast.target: 石行者可以像在空气中一样轻松地穿过石头和泥土。当处于石头或泥土中时，它们处于隐藏状态，并免疫所有伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to roar while within a cave and cause a cave-in. All targets within Close range must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (14) or take 2d10 physical damage. The rubble can be cleared with a Progress Countdown (8).
ast.target: 消耗一个恐惧点，在洞穴内咆哮并引发塌方。所有近距离内的目标必须成功通过敏捷反应检定（14），否则受到2d10点物理伤害。碎石可以通过一个进度倒计时（8）来清除。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Stonewraith makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当石行者对一名玩家角色发动攻击成功时，你获得一个恐惧点。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A battle-hardened mage trained in destructive magic.
ast.target: 一位身经百战、精通破坏性魔法的法师。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Before or after making a standard attack, you can mark a Stress to teleport to a location within Far range.
ast.target: 在进行标准攻击之前或之后，你可以标记一个压力点，传送至远距离内的一个位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to refresh the Wizard's "Warding Sphere" reaction.
ast.target: 标记一个压力点，以刷新法师的“守护法球”反应。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to unleash a precise hail of magical blasts. All targets in the scene must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d12 magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.
ast.target: 消耗一个恐惧点，释放一波精准的魔法冲击。场景中的所有目标必须进行敏捷反应检定。失败的目标受到2d12点魔法伤害。成功的目标受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Wizard takes damage from an attack within Close range, deal 2d6 magic damage to the attacker. This reaction can't be used again until the Wizard refreshes it with their "Refresh Warding Sphere" action.
ast.target: 当法师受到近距离内攻击的伤害时，对攻击者造成2d6点魔法伤害。此反应在法师通过其“刷新守护法球”动作刷新前无法再次使用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A winged insect the size of a large house with iridescent scales and wings that move too fast to track.
ast.target: 一只翼展如大型房屋般大小的有翼昆虫，拥有虹彩鳞片和移动快得无法追踪的翅膀。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Flickerfly makes an attack, the target's Evasion is halved against the attack.
ast.target: 当闪烁飞虫发动攻击时，目标的闪避值在此次攻击中减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Flickerfly can move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.
ast.target: 飞行时，闪烁飞虫在采取行动前可以移动至远距离，而非近距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to whirl, making an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Flickerfly succeeds against take 3d8 direct physical damage.
ast.target: 消耗一个恐惧点，旋转身体，对极近距离内的所有目标发动攻击。闪烁飞虫成功命中的目标受到3d8点直接物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Flickerfly takes damage from an attack within Close range, you can mark a Stress to take half damage.
ast.target: 当闪烁飞虫受到近距离内攻击的伤害时，你可以标记一个压力点，使受到的伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A regal cloaked monstrosity with circular horns adorned with treasure.
ast.target: 一个披着斗篷、长着环形角、角上装饰着财宝的威严怪物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 3 handfuls of gold (or a Fear) to spotlight 1d4+1 allies.
ast.target: 消耗3把金币（或一个恐惧点），以聚光灯照射1d4+1名盟友。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to weigh down the spirits of all PCs within Far range. All targets affected replace their Hope Die with a d8 until they roll a success with Hope or their next rest.
ast.target: 消耗一个恐惧点，压制远距离内所有玩家角色的精神。所有受影响的目标将他们的希望骰替换为d8，直到他们用希望骰掷出成功或下次休息。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC fails with Fear, you can mark a Stress to cause all other PCs within Close range to lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当一名玩家角色以恐惧失败时，你可以标记一个压力点，使近距离内的所有其他玩家角色失去一点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A fickle creature of spindly limbs and insatiable desires.
ast.target: 一种四肢纤细、欲望无度的善变生物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature within Close range takes damage from a different adversary, you can mark a Stress to add a d4 to the damage roll.
ast.target: 当近距离内的一个生物受到来自不同敌人的伤害时，你可以标记一个压力点，为伤害骰增加一个d4。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to boil the blood of all PCs within Far range. They use a d20 as their Fear Die until the end of the scene.
ast.target: 消耗一个恐惧点，使远距离内所有玩家角色的血液沸腾。他们使用一个d20作为他们的恐惧骰，直到场景结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A wide-winged pet endlessly loyal to their vampire owner.
ast.target: 一只宽翼的蝙蝠，对吸血鬼主人无限忠诚。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Bat gains a +3 bonus to their Difficulty.
ast.target: 飞行时，蝙蝠的难度获得+3加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to send a high-pitch screech out toward all targets in front of the Bat within Far range. Those targets must mark 1d4 Stress.
ast.target: 标记一个压力点，向蝙蝠前方远距离内的所有目标发出高频尖啸。这些目标必须标记1d4个压力点。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A nature spirit in the form of a humanoid tree.
ast.target: 一个以人形树木形态出现的自然精灵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to grow three Treant Sapling Minions, who appear at Close range and immediately take the spotlight.
ast.target: 消耗一个恐惧点，生长出三个树人幼苗仆从，它们出现在近距离并立即获得聚光灯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When an ally dies within Close range, you can spend a Fear to clear 2 HP and 2 Stress as the fallen ally's life force is returned to the forest.
ast.target: 当一名盟友在近距离内死亡时，你可以消耗一个恐惧点，清除2点生命值和2个压力点，因为倒下盟友的生命力回归了森林。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A living landslide of boulders and dust, as large as a house.
ast.target: 一场由巨石和尘土组成的活体山崩，大小如同房屋。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to attack a target within Very Close range. On a success, deal 2d4+7 physical damage and the target's next action has disadvantage. On a failure, the target must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 标记一个压力点，攻击极近距离内的一个目标。成功时，造成2d4+7点物理伤害，且目标的下一次行动具有劣势。失败时，目标必须标记一个压力点。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A translucent green mound of acid taller than most humans.
ast.target: 一个半透明的绿色酸液土丘，比大多数人高。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A quadrupedal scaled beast with multiple long-necked heads, each filled with menacing fangs.
ast.target: 一只四足的鳞甲野兽，拥有多个长颈头颅，每个头颅都长满骇人的尖牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Hydra begins with three heads and can have up to five. When the Hydra takes Major or greater damage, they lose a head.
ast.target: 九头蛇初始拥有三个头颅，最多可拥有五个。当九头蛇受到重大或更高级别的伤害时，它们会失去一个头颅。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Hydra has any marked HP, spend a Fear to clear a HP and grow two heads.
ast.target: 如果九头蛇有任何已标记的生命值，消耗一个恐惧点，清除一点生命值并生长出两个头颅。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: All PCs within Far range lose 2 Hope.
ast.target: 远距离内的所有玩家角色失去2点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Hydra takes magic damage, they become Dazed until the next roll with Fear. While Dazed, they can't use their Regeneration action but are immune to magic damage.
ast.target: 当九头蛇受到魔法伤害时，它们会陷入眩晕状态，直到下一次使用恐惧骰检定。眩晕期间，它们无法使用其再生动作，但免疫魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sovereign ruler of a nation, wreathed in the privilege of tradition and wielding unmatched power in their domain.
ast.target: 一个国家的至高统治者，被传统的特权所环绕，在其领域内掌握着无与伦比的权力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, mark a Stress to summon six Tier 3 Minions, who appear at Close range to enforce the Monarch's will.
ast.target: 每场景一次，标记一个压力点，召唤六个3级仆从，它们出现在近距离以执行君主的意志。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Long-Term Countdown (8). Spend a Fear to activate after the Monarch's desire for war is first revealed. When it triggers, the Monarch has a reason to rally the nation to war and the support to act on that reason. You gain 1d4 Fear.
ast.target: 长期倒计时（8）。消耗一个恐惧点，在君主的战争欲望首次显露后激活。当它触发时，君主有了集结国家开战的理由以及支持该理由的行动力。你获得1d4个恐惧点。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A knight with huge, majestic antlers wearing armor made of dangerous thorns.
ast.target: 一位头戴巨大、雄伟鹿角、身穿危险荆棘盔甲的骑士。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Knight succeeds on a standard attack from above a target, they deal 3d12+3 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
ast.target: 当骑士从目标上方发动标准攻击成功时，他们造成3d12+3点物理伤害，而非其标准伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Knight succeeds against take physical damage equal to 3d4 + the target's Major threshold.
ast.target: 消耗一个恐惧点，对极近距离内的所有目标发动攻击。骑士成功命中的目标受到等于3d4 + 目标重大阈值的物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Knight takes damage from an attack within Melee range, you can mark a Stress to deal 1d10+5 physical damage to the attacker.
ast.target: 当骑士受到近战范围内攻击的伤害时，你可以标记一个压力点，对攻击者造成1d10+5点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 一棵坚固的、会动的古树。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to Root the Treant in place. The Treant is Restrained while Rooted, and can end this effect instead of moving while they are spotlighted. While Rooted, the Treant has resistance to physical damage.
ast.target: 标记一个压力点，将树人扎根于原地。树人在扎根时处于束缚状态，并且可以在获得聚光灯时选择结束此效果而非移动。扎根时，树人对物理伤害具有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Sapling is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Sapling, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 当树苗受到任何伤害时，它就会被击败。玩家角色每对树苗造成6点伤害，就在攻击能成功命中的范围内额外击败一个爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A captivating undead dressed in aristocratic finery.
ast.target: 一位身着贵族华服、引人入胜的亡灵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Vampire makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当吸血鬼成功发动攻击时，所有处于远距离范围内的玩家角色失去1点希望值，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A creature who moves into Melee range of the Vampire must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, you gain 1d4 Fear.
ast.target: 任何进入吸血鬼近战范围的生物必须进行一次本能反应检定。若失败，你获得1d4点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Vampire is within Melee range of an ally, they can cause the ally to mark a HP. The Vampire then clears a HP.
ast.target: 当吸血鬼处于一名盟友的近战范围内时，它可以使该盟友标记1点生命值。随后吸血鬼清除1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to summon 1d4 Vampires, who appear at Far range and immediately take the spotlight.
ast.target: 消耗2点恐惧值，召唤1d4只吸血鬼，它们出现在远距离范围内并立即获得聚光灯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Vampire is spotlighted, roll a d8. On a result of 6 or higher, all targets within Very Close range must mark a HP.
ast.target: 当吸血鬼获得聚光灯时，掷一个d8。若结果为6或更高，所有处于极近距离范围内的目标必须标记1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An intelligent undead with blood-stained lips and a predator's smile.
ast.target: 一个拥有血迹斑斑的嘴唇和捕食者般微笑的智慧亡灵。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, deal 5d4 physical damage. A target who marks HP from this attack loses a Hope and must mark a Stress. The Vampire then clears a HP.
ast.target: 对近战范围内的一个目标发动攻击。若成功，造成5d4点物理伤害。因这次攻击而标记生命值的目标失去1点希望值，并必须标记1点压力值。随后吸血鬼清除1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Vampire takes physical damage, you can spend a Fear to take half damage.
ast.target: 当吸血鬼受到物理伤害时，你可以消耗1点恐惧值来使伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A boxy, dust-covered construct with thick metallic swinging doors on their torso.
ast.target: 一个布满灰尘、躯干上带有厚重金属摆门的箱形构造体。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target is Restrained within the Gaoler until freed with a successful Strength Roll (18). While Restrained, the target can only attack the Gaoler.
ast.target: 标记1点压力值，对极近距离范围内的一个目标发动攻击。若成功，目标被囚禁者束缚，直到通过一次成功的力量检定（18）被解救。在被束缚期间，目标只能攻击囚禁者。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A dust-covered golden construct with boxy limbs and a huge mace for a hand.
ast.target: 一个布满灰尘、四肢呈箱形、一只手是巨大钉头锤的金色构造体。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Targets who take damage from the Sentinel's standard attack are knocked back to Very Close range.
ast.target: 受到哨兵标准攻击伤害的目标会被击退至极近距离范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to choose a target within Very Close range to focus on. That target has disadvantage on attack rolls when they're within Very Close range of the Sentinel. The Sentinel can only focus on one target at a time.
ast.target: 标记1点压力值，选择极近距离范围内的一个目标进行专注。当该目标处于哨兵的极近距离范围内时，其攻击检定具有劣势。哨兵一次只能专注一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to lob explosive magic at a point within Far range. All targets within Very Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d8+20 magic damage and are knocked back to Close range. Targets who succeed take half damage and aren't knocked back.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧值，向远距离范围内的一个点投掷爆炸性魔法。所有处于该点极近距离范围内的目标必须进行一次敏捷反应检定。失败的目标受到2d8+20点魔法伤害，并被击退至近距离范围。成功的目标受到一半伤害，且不会被击退。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Sentinel makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当哨兵对一名玩家角色成功发动攻击时，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive living turret with reinforced armor and twelve pistondriven mechanical legs.
ast.target: 一个拥有强化装甲和十二条活塞驱动机械腿的巨型活体炮塔。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you spotlight the Turret and they don't have a token on their stat block, they can't make a standard attack. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they're preparing to do. When you spotlight the Turret and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can attack.
ast.target: 当你将聚光灯给予炮塔且其状态栏上没有标记时，它无法进行标准攻击。在其状态栏上放置一个标记，并描述它正在准备做什么。当你将聚光灯给予炮塔且其状态栏上有标记时，清除该标记，它便可以攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to Mark a target within Far range until the Turret is destroyed or the Marked target becomes Hidden. While the target is Marked, their Evasion is halved.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧值，标记远距离范围内的一个目标，直到炮塔被摧毁或被标记的目标变为隐藏状态。当目标被标记时，其闪避值减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When another adversary deals damage to a target within Far range of the Turret, you can mark a Stress to add the Turret's standard attack damage to the damage roll.
ast.target: 当另一个对手对炮塔远距离范围内的一个目标造成伤害时，你可以标记1点压力值，将炮塔的标准攻击伤害加到伤害掷骰中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Turret is destroyed, they explode. All targets within Close range must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 3d20 physical damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.
ast.target: 当炮塔被摧毁时，它会爆炸。所有处于近距离范围内的目标必须进行一次敏捷反应检定。失败的目标受到3d20点物理伤害。成功的目标受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A glacier-blue dragon with four powerful limbs and frost-tinged wings.
ast.target: 一条冰川蓝色的巨龙，拥有四条强壮的肢体和带有霜气的翅膀。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If a target damaged by the Dragon doesn't mark an Armor Slot to reduce the damage, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 如果被巨龙伤害的目标没有标记护甲槽来减少伤害，他们必须标记1点压力值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC rolls with Fear while within Far range of the Dragon, they lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当一名玩家角色在巨龙远距离范围内进行带有恐惧的掷骰时，他们失去1点希望值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature makes a successful attack against the Dragon from within Very Close range, they must mark a Stress and become Chilled until their next rest or they clear a Stress. While they are Chilled, they have disadvantage on attack rolls.
ast.target: 当一个生物在极近距离范围内对巨龙成功发动攻击时，他们必须标记1点压力值，并变为“寒冷”状态，直到他们下次休息或清除1点压力值。在“寒冷”状态下，他们的攻击检定具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Dragon makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当巨龙对一名玩家角色成功发动攻击时，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A decaying mage adorned in dark, tattered robes.
ast.target: 一位身着破旧黑袍、正在腐朽的法师。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to spotlight 1d4 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage, or full damage if you spend a Fear.
ast.target: 标记1点压力值，为1d4名盟友提供聚光灯。他们在此聚光灯下发动的攻击造成一半伤害，或者如果你消耗1点恐惧值，则造成全额伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark 2 Stress to cause all targets within Far range to make a Strength Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d20+12 magic damage and you gain a Fear. Targets who succeed take half damage. A target who marks 2 or more HP must also mark 2 Stress and becomes Vulnerable until they roll with Hope.
ast.target: 标记2点压力值，使远距离范围内的所有目标进行一次力量反应检定。失败的目标受到2d20+12点魔法伤害，你获得1点恐惧值。成功的目标受到一半伤害。标记了2点或更多生命值的目标还必须标记2点压力值，并变为“易伤”状态，直到他们进行一次带有希望的掷骰。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to summon a Zombie Legion, which appears at Close range and immediately takes the spotlight.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧值，召唤一支僵尸军团，它出现在近距离范围内并立即获得聚光灯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Countdown (Loop 2d6). When the Necromancer has marked 6 or more of their HP, activate the countdown. When it triggers, deal 2d10+6 direct magic damage to a target within Close range. The Necromancer then clears a number of Stress or HP equal to the number of HP marked by the target from this attack.
ast.target: 倒计时（循环2d6）。当死灵法师标记了6点或更多生命值时，激活倒计时。当它触发时，对近距离范围内的一个目标造成2d10+6点直接魔法伤害。随后死灵法师清除等于该目标因这次攻击所标记生命值数量的压力值或生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A cursed soul bound to the Fallen's will.
ast.target: 一个被堕落者意志束缚的诅咒灵魂。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Shock Troop is defeated when they take any damage. For every 12 damage a PC deals to the Shock Troop, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 当突击兵受到任何伤害时，他们就会被击败。玩家角色每对突击兵造成12点伤害，就在攻击能成功命中的范围内额外击败一个爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC marks HP from an attack by the Shock Troop, they lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当一名玩家角色因突击兵的攻击而标记生命值时，他们失去1点希望值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A powerful mage bound by the bargains they made in life.
ast.target: 一位被生前契约所束缚的强大法师。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to unleash an all-consuming firestorm and make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Sorcerer succeeds against take 2d10+6 direct magic damage.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧值，释放一场吞噬一切的火风暴，并对近距离范围内的所有目标发动攻击。术士成功命中的目标受到2d10+6点直接魔法伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to trap a target within Far range in a powerful illusion of their worst fears. While trapped, the target is Restrained and Vulnerable until they break free, ending both conditions, with a successful Instinct Roll.
ast.target: 标记1点压力值，将远距离范围内的一个目标困在他们最深恐惧的强大幻象中。在被困期间，目标被束缚并处于“易伤”状态，直到他们通过一次成功的本能检定挣脱，结束这两种状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Sorcerer takes damage from an attack, they can teleport up to Far range.
ast.target: 当术士受到攻击伤害时，他们可以传送至远距离范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A Fallen God, wreathed in rage and resentment, bearing millennia of experience in breaking heroes' spirits.
ast.target: 一位被愤怒与怨恨所笼罩、拥有数千年粉碎英雄意志经验的堕落神祇。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Realm-Breaker takes damage, reduce it by 2d10.
ast.target: 当破界者受到伤害时，减少2d10点伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. When a target uses armor to reduce damage from this attack, they must mark 2 Armor Slots.
ast.target: 标记1点压力值，对极近距离范围内的所有目标发动一次标准攻击。当目标使用护甲来减少这次攻击的伤害时，他们必须标记2个护甲槽。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a target marks HP from an attack by the Realm-Breaker, all PCs within Far range of the target must lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当一个目标因破界者的攻击而标记生命值时，所有处于该目标远距离范围内的玩家角色必须失去1点希望值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: That which only the most feared have a chance to fear.
ast.target: 唯有最令人恐惧之物才可能感到恐惧的存在。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Undefeated Champion takes damage, reduce it by 1d10.
ast.target: 当不败冠军受到伤害时，减少1d10点伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. PCs the Champion succeeds against lose a number of Hope equal to the HP they marked from this attack.
ast.target: 标记1点压力值，对极近距离范围内的所有目标发动一次标准攻击。冠军成功命中的玩家角色失去等于他们因这次攻击所标记生命值数量的希望值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to summon a number of Fallen Shock Troops equal to twice the number of PCs. The Shock Troops appear at Far range.
ast.target: 消耗1点恐惧值，召唤数量为玩家角色两倍的堕落突击兵。突击兵出现在远距离范围内。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Undefeated Champion makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当不败冠军对一名玩家角色成功发动攻击时，你获得1点恐惧值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a target marks HP from an attack by the Undefeated Champion, all PCs within Far range of the target lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当一个目标因不败冠军的攻击而标记生命值时，所有处于该目标远距离范围内的玩家角色失去1点希望值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Archer deals double damage to targets marked Guilty by a High Seraph.
ast.target: 弓箭手对被高阶炽天使标记为“有罪”的目标造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make a standard attack against up to three targets.
ast.target: 标记一个“压力”，对最多三个目标进行一次标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Souls of the faithful, lifted up with divine weaponry.
ast.target: 信徒的灵魂，被神圣的武器所升华。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Soldier is defeated when they take any damage. For every 13 damage a PC deals to the Soldier, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 士兵受到任何伤害时即被击败。玩家角色每对士兵造成13点伤害，即可额外击败射程内一个攻击能成功命中的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the Soldier is flying, spend a Fear to move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.
ast.target: 当士兵处于飞行状态时，花费一个“恐惧”，可在采取行动前移动至“远”射程，而非“近”射程。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A divine champion, head of a hallowed host of warriors who enforce their god's will.
ast.target: 一位神圣的冠军，统率着一支执行神之意志的圣洁战士军团。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the Seraph is flying, spend a Fear to move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.
ast.target: 当炽天使处于飞行状态时，花费一个“恐惧”，可在采取行动前移动至“远”射程，而非“近”射程。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to reflect a sliver of divinity as a searing beam of light that hits up to twenty targets within Very Far range. Targets must make a Presence Reaction Roll, with disadvantage if they are marked Guilty. Targets who fail take 4d6+12 magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.
ast.target: 标记一个“压力”，将一丝神性反射为一道灼热的光束，命中“极远”射程内最多二十个目标。目标必须进行一次“存在”反应掷骰，若被标记为“有罪”则处于劣势。失败的目标受到4d6+12点魔法伤害。成功的目标受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, spend a Fear to spotlight all other adversaries within Far range. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.
ast.target: 每场景一次，花费一个“恐惧”，使“远”射程内所有其他敌人都成为聚光灯目标。以这种方式被聚光灯照射的敌人进行的攻击造成一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A legendary beast of the sea, bigger than the largest galleon, with sucker-laden tentacles and a terrifying maw.
ast.target: 一头传奇的海兽，比最大的帆船还要庞大，长满吸盘的触手和骇人的巨口。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the Kraken has 7 or fewer marked HP, they can make their standard attack against two targets within range.
ast.target: 当海妖标记的生命值为7点或更少时，他们可以对射程内的两个目标进行标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to spew a line of boiling water at any number of targets in a line up to Far range. All targets must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 4d6+9 physical damage. If a target marks an Armor Slot to reduce the damage, they must also mark a Stress.
ast.target: 花费一个“恐惧”，向“远”射程内一条直线上的任意数量目标喷射一道沸水。所有目标必须成功通过一次“敏捷”反应掷骰，否则受到4d6+9点物理伤害。如果目标标记一个护甲槽来减少伤害，他们还必须标记一个“压力”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Kraken makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当海妖对一名玩家角色造成成功的攻击时，你获得一个“恐惧”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A towering immortal and incarnation of fate, cursed to only see bad outcomes.
ast.target: 一位高耸的不朽者，命运的化身，被诅咒只能看到糟糕的结局。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Oracle makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当神谕者造成成功的攻击时，“远”射程内所有玩家角色失去一点“希望”，你获得一个“恐惧”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature rolls a failure while within Very Far range of the Oracle, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 当一个生物在神谕者“极远”射程内掷骰失败时，他们必须标记一个“压力”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to present a target within Far range with a vision of their personal nightmare. The target must make a Knowledge Reaction Roll. On a failure, they lose all Hope and take 2d20+4 direct magic damage. On a success, they take half damage and lose a Hope.
ast.target: 花费一个“恐惧”，向“远”射程内的一个目标展示其个人噩梦的幻象。目标必须进行一次“知识”反应掷骰。失败时，他们失去所有“希望”并受到2d20+4点直接魔法伤害。成功时，他们受到一半伤害并失去一点“希望”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per day, spend 2 Fear to summon 2d4 Tier 2 or below Minions relevant to one of the PC's personal nightmares. They appear at Close range relative to that PC.
ast.target: 每天一次，花费2个“恐惧”，召唤2d4个2级或以下的爪牙，这些爪牙与某个玩家角色的个人噩梦相关。他们出现在该玩家角色“近”射程处。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Oracle sees a mortal creature, they instantly know one of their personal nightmares.
ast.target: 当神谕者看到一个凡间生物时，他们立刻知道该生物的一个个人噩梦。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Oracle marks HP from an attack within Very Close range, you can mark a Stress to knock the attacker back to Far range and deal 2d10+4 physical damage.
ast.target: 当神谕者因“极近”射程内的攻击而标记生命值时，你可以标记一个“压力”，将攻击者击退至“远”射程，并造成2d10+4点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A chaotic mockery of life, constantly in flux.
ast.target: 对生命的一种混乱嘲弄，不断变化。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Abomination attacks, roll 2d4 and use the result as their attack modifier.
ast.target: 当畸变体攻击时，掷2d4，将结果用作他们的攻击修正值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a target takes damage from the Abomination, they must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, they gain disadvantage on their next action roll and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当一个目标受到畸变体的伤害时，他们必须进行一次“本能”反应掷骰。失败时，他们下一次行动掷骰处于劣势，你获得一个“恐惧”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC takes damage from the Corrupter, they lose a Hope.
ast.target: 当一名玩家角色受到腐化者的伤害时，他们失去一点“希望”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to spew partially digested portions of consumed realities at all targets within Close range. Targets must succeed on a Knowledge Reaction Roll or mark 2 Stress.
ast.target: 标记一个“压力”，向“近”射程内所有目标喷射部分消化的被吞噬现实碎片。目标必须成功通过一次“知识”反应掷骰，否则标记2个“压力”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Thrall is defeated when they take any damage. For every 13 damage a PC deals to the Thrall, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
ast.target: 奴仆受到任何伤害时即被击败。玩家角色每对奴仆造成13点伤害，即可额外击败射程内一个攻击能成功命中的爪牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enraged by their wounds, the dragon bursts into molten lava.
ast.target: 被伤口激怒，巨龙爆裂成熔岩。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Molten Scourge takes damage, roll a number of d6s equal to HP marked. For each result of 4 or higher, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当熔岩灾祸受到伤害时，掷出数量等于已标记生命值的d6。每个结果为4或更高的骰子，你获得一个“恐惧”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target takes 4d8+1 physical damage, loses a Hope, and is knocked back to Close range. The Molten Scourge clears a Stress.
ast.target: 标记一个“压力”，对“极近”射程内的一个目标进行一次攻击。成功时，目标受到4d8+1点物理伤害，失去一点“希望”，并被击退至“近”射程。熔岩灾祸清除一个“压力”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Molten Scourge takes Severe damage from an attack within Very Close range, molten blood gushes from the wound and deals 2d10+4 direct physical damage to the attacker.
ast.target: 当熔岩灾祸因“极近”射程内的攻击而受到严重伤害时，熔化的血液从伤口涌出，对攻击者造成2d10+4点直接物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive winged creature with obsidian scales and impossibly sharp claws.
ast.target: 一只巨大的有翼生物，覆盖着黑曜石鳞片和锋利得不可思议的爪子。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Obsidian Predator gains a +3 bonus to their Difficulty.
ast.target: 飞行时，黑曜石掠食者的难度获得+3加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Obsidian Predator is resistant to physical damage.
ast.target: 黑曜石掠食者对物理伤害有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Obsidian Predator succeeds against take 4d6+4 physical damage and are knocked back to Far range and Vulnerable until their next roll with Hope.
ast.target: 标记一个“压力”，对“近”射程内所有目标进行一次攻击。黑曜石掠食者成功命中的目标受到4d6+4点物理伤害，并被击退至“远”射程，且处于“易伤”状态，直到他们下一次带有“希望”的掷骰。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the Obsidian Predator is flying, mark a Stress to choose a point within Far range. Move to that point and make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Obsidian Predator succeeds against take 2d10+6 physical damage and must mark a Stress and lose a Hope.
ast.target: 如果黑曜石掠食者正在飞行，标记一个“压力”，选择“远”射程内的一点。移动到该点，并对“极近”射程内所有目标进行一次攻击。黑曜石掠食者成功命中的目标受到2d10+6点物理伤害，且必须标记一个“压力”并失去一点“希望”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress instead of spending a Fear to spotlight the Ashen Tyrant.
ast.target: 标记一个“压力”而非花费一个“恐惧”，来使灰烬暴君成为聚光灯目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While flying, the Ashen Tyrant gains a +1 bonus to their Difficulty.
ast.target: 飞行时，灰烬暴君的难度获得+1加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC rolls a failure while within Close range of the Ashen Tyrant, they lose a Hope and you gain a Fear. If the PC can't lose a Hope, they must mark a HP.
ast.target: 当一名玩家角色在灰烬暴君“近”射程内掷骰失败时，他们失去一点“希望”，你获得一个“恐惧”。如果该玩家角色无法失去“希望”，他们必须标记一点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Ashen Tyrant succeeds against take 2d20+2 physical damage, are knocked back to Close range of where they were, and must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 标记一个“压力”，对“近”射程内所有目标进行一次攻击。灰烬暴君成功命中的目标受到2d20+2点物理伤害，被击退至他们原来位置的“近”射程处，且必须标记一个“压力”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to smash the ground and kick up ash within Far range. While within the ash cloud, a target has disadvantage on action rolls. The ash cloud clears the next time an adversary is spotlighted.
ast.target: 花费一个“恐惧”，猛击地面，在“远”射程内扬起灰烬。在灰烬云中时，目标的行动掷骰处于劣势。当下一个敌人成为聚光灯目标时，灰烬云消散。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A towering, muscular zombie with magically infused strength and skill.
ast.target: 一具高大、肌肉发达的僵尸，拥有魔法灌注的力量和技巧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Zombie makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当僵尸造成成功的攻击时，“远”射程内所有玩家角色失去一点“希望”，你获得一个“恐惧”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: PCs can't spend Hope to use features against the Zombie.
ast.target: 玩家角色无法花费“希望”来对僵尸使用特性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Mark a Stress to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Zombie succeeds against are Vulnerable until their next rest.
ast.target: 标记一个“压力”，对“极近”射程内所有目标进行一次标准攻击。僵尸成功命中的目标处于“易伤”状态，直到他们下一次休息。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When another adversary deals damage to a target within Very Close range of the Zombie, you can spend a Fear to add the Zombie's standard attack damage to the damage roll.
ast.target: 当另一个敌人对僵尸“极近”射程内的一个目标造成伤害时，你可以花费一个“恐惧”，将僵尸的标准攻击伤害加到伤害掷骰中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A large pack of undead, still powerful despite their rotting flesh.
ast.target: 一大群亡灵，尽管肉体腐烂，但依然强大。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Legion has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d6+5 physical damage instead.
ast.target: 当军团标记了半数或更多的生命值时，他们的标准攻击改为造成2d6+5点物理伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Legion has resistance to physical damage.
ast.target: 军团对物理伤害有抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the Legion takes Minor damage from an attack within Melee range, you can mark a Stress to make a standard attack with advantage against the attacker.
ast.target: 当军团因“近战”射程内的攻击而受到轻微伤害时，你可以标记一个“压力”，对攻击者进行一次带有优势的标准攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A former druidic grove lying fallow and fully reclaimed by nature.
ast.target: 一片曾经的德鲁伊林地，如今已休耕并完全被自然重新占据。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A Young Dryad, two Sylvan Soldiers, and a number of Minor Treants equal to the number of PCs appear to confront the party for their intrusion.
ast.target: 一位年轻的树精、两名森林士兵，以及数量与玩家角色相等的次级树人出现，因队伍的闯入而前来对峙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An ambush is set to catch an unsuspecting party off-guard.
ast.target: 设下伏击，以期在毫无防备的队伍措手不及时将其捕获。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The Difficulty of this environment equals that of the adversary with the highest Difficulty.
ast.target: 此环境的难度等于难度最高的敌人的难度。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An ambush is set by the PCs to catch unsuspecting adversaries off-guard.
ast.target: 由玩家角色设下伏击，以期在毫无防备的敌人措手不及时将其捕获。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC starts the ambush on unsuspecting adversaries, you lose 2 Fear and the first attack roll a PC makes has advantage.
ast.target: 当一名玩家角色在毫无防备的敌人身上发动伏击时，你失去2点恐惧值，且玩家角色进行的第一次攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: PCs can gain advantage on a Presence Roll by offering a handful of gold as part of the interaction.
ast.target: 玩家角色可以通过在互动中提供一把金币，来获得在威势检定上的优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Reveal to the PCs that one of the merchants has something they want or need, such as food from their home, a rare book, magical components, a dubious treasure map, or a magical key.
ast.target: 向玩家角色揭示，其中一位商人拥有他们想要或需要的东西，例如来自家乡的食物、一本稀有书籍、魔法材料、一张可疑的藏宝图，或是一把魔法钥匙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A steep, rocky cliffside tall enough to make traversal dangerous.
ast.target: 一处陡峭、岩石嶙峋的悬崖，其高度足以使攀爬变得危险。

ast.name: desc
